description: Shared Step 8 practical-device baselines. Adapters must read this config and record page-specific adjustments in seo-content-brief.json instead of maintaining separate prompt-only lists.

guide.reason: Guides need enough practical support to turn instruction into usable action.

tutorial.reason: Tutorials need clear sequencing plus practical failure handling.

comparison.reason: Comparison pages need visible trade-offs and scenario-based decision support.

safety_explainer.reason: Safety explainers must make limits, uncertainty, and unsafe framings visible.

pricing.reason: Pricing pages need current-context boundaries and real decision scenarios.

local.reason: Local pages need market-specific examples and clear local assumption boundaries.

alternatives.reason: Alternatives pages need fit-based routing instead of generic option lists.

product_category.reason: Product/category pages need suitability boundaries before recommendation language.

how_to.reason: How-to pages need action clarity plus recovery paths for common failure points.

definition_or_concept.reason: Concept pages need examples and boundaries so definitions do not stay abstract.
